name: Credit Justice Services, Inc
description_short: Credit Justice Services, Inc is a credit repair provider based in Jacksonville, Florida. Rated 3.7/5 on Google.
description_long:
Credit Justice Services, Inc is a credit repair provider serving clients in Jacksonville, Florida. The company serves consumers in the Jacksonville area who are looking to repair and improve their credit scores.

Credit Justice Services, Inc specializes in credit repair services designed to help consumers repair and improve their credit scores.

When evaluating credit repair services in Jacksonville, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Credit Justice Services, Inc operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Jacksonville, Florida area who are considering Credit Justice Services, Inc should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
